'''shozangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabilizable|stabilizable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabilizable|stabilizable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shozangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozangithi|shozangithi]] || [[word:shozangiji|shozangiji]] || [[word:shozangishi|shozangishi]] || [[word:shozangiki|shozangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozanguthuthu|shozanguthuthu]] || [[word:shozangujuju|shozangujuju]] || [[word:shozangushushu|shozangushushu]] || [[word:shozangukuku|shozangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozanguthu|shozanguthu]] || [[word:shozanguju|shozanguju]] || [[word:shozangushu|shozangushu]] || [[word:shozanguku|shozanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozangufthuf|shozangufthuf]] || [[word:shozangufjuf|shozangufjuf]] || [[word:shozangufshuf|shozangufshuf]] || [[word:shozangufkuf|shozangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozangethe|shozangethe]] || [[word:shozangeje|shozangeje]] || [[word:shozangeshe|shozangeshe]] || [[word:shozangeke|shozangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozangothotho|shozangothotho]] || [[word:shozangojojo|shozangojojo]] || [[word:shozangoshosho|shozangoshosho]] || [[word:shozangokoko|shozangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozangotho|shozangotho]] || [[word:shozangojo|shozangojo]] || [[word:shozangosho|shozangosho]] || [[word:shozangoko|shozangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozangofthof|shozangofthof]] || [[word:shozangofjof|shozangofjof]] || [[word:shozangofshof|shozangofshof]] || [[word:shozangofkof|shozangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfthĂŻf|shozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfjĂŻf|shozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfshĂŻf|shozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfkĂŻf|shozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shozangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shozangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shozangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shozangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfthĂŻf|shozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfjĂŻf|shozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfshĂŻf|shozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfkĂŻf|shozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfthĂŻf|shozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfjĂŻf|shozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfshĂŻf|shozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozangĂŻfkĂŻf|shozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozangĂŠthĂŠ|shozangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shozangĂŠjĂŠ|shozangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shozangĂŠshĂŠ|shozangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shozangĂŠkĂŠ|shozangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozangathatha|shozangathatha]] || [[word:shozangajaja|shozangajaja]] || [[word:shozangashasha|shozangashasha]] || [[word:shozangakaka|shozangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozangatha|shozangatha]] || [[word:shozangaja|shozangaja]] || [[word:shozangasha|shozangasha]] || [[word:shozangaka|shozangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozangafthaf|shozangafthaf]] || [[word:shozangafjaf|shozangafjaf]] || [[word:shozangafshaf|shozangafshaf]] || [[word:shozangafkaf|shozangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shozangasha|shozangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozangshĂ«sha|shozangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozangrosha|shozangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozangmusha|shozangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozangyasha|shozangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozangnkshĂ«sha|goshozangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozangnkrosha|goshozangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozangnkmusha|goshozangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozangnkyasha|goshozangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shozazangasha|shozazangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozazangshĂ«sha|shozazangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozazangrosha|shozazangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozazangmusha|shozazangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozazangyasha|shozazangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozazangnkshĂ«sha|goshozazangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozazangnkrosha|goshozazangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozazangnkmusha|goshozazangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozazangnkyasha|goshozazangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shezĂŠngasha|shezĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shezĂŠngshĂ«sha|shezĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shezĂŠngrosha|shezĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shezĂŠngmusha|shezĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shezĂŠngyasha|shezĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshezĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|goshezĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshezĂŠngnkrosha|goshezĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshezĂŠngnkmusha|goshezĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshezĂŠngnkyasha|goshezĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shozfangasha|shozfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozfangshĂ«sha|shozfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozfangrosha|shozfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozfangmusha|shozfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozfangyasha|shozfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozfangnkshĂ«sha|goshozfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozfangnkrosha|goshozfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozfangnkmusha|goshozfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozfangnkyasha|goshozfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
